{{ $h := hugo.Data.home.hero }} {{ $p := .Site.Params }} {{- $heroImg := $p.logo.hero | default "/mokksy-mascot-256.png" -}}
{{ $h.badge }}

{{ $h.title.prefix }}{{ $h.title.highlight }}
{{ $h.title.suffix }}

{{ $h.sub | replaceRE `\n+` " " | strings.TrimSpace }}

{{ $h.primary_cta.label }} {{ with $p.github }} {{ $h.github_cta.label }} {{ end }}
{{ partial "home/section-carousel.html" . }}
